goal: Add a side-effect-free authority-review intake builder for memory-cache audit export permit issuance request packets while keeping permit issuance, file writes, durable persistence, external actions, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, write export files, add durable persistence, call external systems, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Memory-cache audit export request packets can be accepted for authority review without issuing a permit.
Authority review, reviewer, and intake evidence refs are required.
File-write and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Actual authority decision, permit issuance, and export writing require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing authority ref, and blocked request packet cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, file writes, durable persistence, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-096 converted memory-cache audit export permit issuance readiness into a request packet without issuing a permit.
